task_completion.description: Verify the PDF file is attached to the correct library item.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero library view, the item 'Attention Is All You Need' is expanded or selected, showing a PDF attachment (likely named attention_paper.pdf) nested under it.

task_completion.description: Verify the PDF is opened in the PDF reader.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tab or window is open showing the PDF content of the 'Attention Is All You Need' paper.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct sentence in the Abstract is highlighted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sentence starting with 'We propose a new simple network architecture, the Transformer...' and ending with '...dispensing with recurrence and convolutions entirely.' has a visible highlight over it in the PDF reader.

task_completion.description: Verify the annotation sidebar or comment popup is active for the highlight.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Zotero annotation sidebar (usually on the left or right) is open, or a comment popup is displayed next to the highlighted text.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct comment text is added to the highlight.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Core definition' is visible inside the comment box attached to the specific highlight in the annotations sidebar or popup.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Zotero GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Zotero application interface being interacted with (e.g., clicking menus, using the highlight tool), rather than terminal commands executing scripts to modify the database.

integrity.description: Verify the annotation was made using actual PDF reader tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The highlight and comment should appear as native PDF annotations within the reader interface, not as text pasted into a separate text editor or image manipulation program.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI to directly edit the Zotero SQLite database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing sqlite3 commands or Python scripts directly inserting records into zotero.sqlite.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target paper in Zotero is 'Attention Is All You Need'. The PDF to attach is located at '/home/ga/Documents/attention_paper.pdf'. The exact text that must be highlighted is: 'We propose a new simple network architecture, the Transformer, based solely on attention mechanisms, dispensing with recurrence and convolutions entirely.' The exact comment text to add to this highlight is 'Core definition'.
